page_title: Shinji and Good Friends: Is That Solitaire?
text:
is a video game that was developed and published by GAINAX on 26 February 1999 for Microsoft Windows 95/98. It was sold for 7800 Yen (plus tax) when released.

Overview

A game of Solitaire featuring seven variations of games, each character has special new voiced lines. The minimum requirements for this game are: a Pentium computer with 16MB RAM, 640 x 480 resolution monitors, 5MB of disk space, and a Windows 95-J operating system. http://web.archive.org/web/20050407132735/www.gainax.co.jp/soft/solitia/index-e.html 

Characters

Shinji Ikari
Rei Ayanami
Asuka Langley Sohryu
Kaworu Nagisa
Tōji Suzuhara
Misato Katsuragi
Ritsuko Akagi
Ryoji Kaji
Gendo Ikari

Trivia

The cover was illustrated by Takeshi Honda.
This is the first game appearance of Kaworu Nagisa.
